_comment: Trade-specific build config. prep.php reads this to pick accent colour + tone hints per client. Unknown trade falls back to defaults.
default_tone: Plain-spoken Aussie tradie voice. Confident, no buzzwords.

plumber.tone_hint: Emergency-ready. Lead with after-hours call-outs, licence, hot-water/gas focus.

electrician.tone_hint: Safety-first. Lead with licence number, switchboards, safety switches, LED upgrades.

builder.tone_hint: Portfolio-led. Lead with completed projects, licence, budget/timeframe capture.

painter.tone_hint: Visual-first. Before/after focus, interior vs exterior, colour consult.

concreter.tone_hint: Practical. Driveways, slabs, exposed aggregate, decorative finishes.

tiler.tone_hint: Detail-focused. Bathrooms, kitchens, waterproofing, straight lines.

landscaper.tone_hint: Outdoor transformation. Turf, decks, retaining walls, garden design.

fencer.tone_hint: Privacy + property line. Colorbond, timber, pool fencing compliance.

roofer.tone_hint: Emergency leaks + restoration. Storm damage, tile vs Colorbond, inspections.

air-conditioning.tone_hint: Comfort + install. Split systems, ducted, after-sale service.

carpenter.tone_hint: Craft-first. Custom joinery, decks, pergolas, renovations.

pest-control.tone_hint: Licensed, safe for kids + pets. Termites, rodents, commercial.

handyman.tone_hint: Generalist. Small jobs, odd fixes, honest hourly rate.

glazier.tone_hint: Emergency glass. Broken window same-day, shopfronts, splashbacks.

plasterer.tone_hint: Finishing trade. Smooth walls, repairs after reno, cornicing.

flooring.tone_hint: Material expert. Timber, laminate, tile, vinyl — per use-case.

solar-installer.tone_hint: Energy + savings. CEC-accredited, payback, battery options.

locksmith.tone_hint: 24/7 access. Lockouts, rekey, security upgrades, insurance-grade.

pool-builder.tone_hint: Dream-backyard focus. Concrete vs fibreglass, council approvals.

demolition.tone_hint: Licensed + insured. Asbestos-safe, site clearing, waste removal.

arborist.tone_hint: Certified + insured. Tree removal, pruning, council-protected trees.

pressure-washing.tone_hint: Driveways, houses, decks. Before/after power of clean.

irrigation.tone_hint: Water-smart. Lawn sprinklers, drip, controllers, dripline.

gas-fitter.tone_hint: Licensed + certified. BBQs, hot water, gas leak emergencies.

concrete-cutter.tone_hint: Precision + industrial. Sawcutting, core drilling, demolition-ready.

renderer.tone_hint: Finish trade. Acrylic vs cement, feature walls, modern facades.

general-tradie.tone_hint: Multi-skilled. Small jobs, handyman+, honest per-hour rate.
